backstory.original: Umberto Thornheart is the orphaned child of two infamous thieves, and saw his parents executed for their crimes. Rather than live on the streets, he was taken in by the very detective who arrested his parents, and eventually became a detective himself, hoping to protect the innocent and (perhaps) reform the guilty.
backstory.display: 翁贝托·棘心在亲眼见到臭名昭著的小偷父母获罪处决后，变成了孤儿。他没有流浪街头，而是被逮捕父母的侦探收养，并最终成长为一名侦探，希望能够保护无辜之人，以及改造罪犯（如果可以的话）。

description.original: Umberto magically unleashes a bee swarm at the nearest foe, dealing 1 hit.
description.display: 翁贝托如同施放魔法般向最近的敌人释放蜂群，造成 1 次命中伤害。

description.original: Umberto transforms into a bear for 15 seconds, encouraging allies to attack more often.
description.display: 翁贝托变身成熊，持续 15 秒，激励盟友提高攻击频率。

longDescription.original: Umberto transforms into a bear for 15 seconds, encouraging allies to immediately attack and attack more often.
longDescription.display: 翁贝托变身成熊，持续 15 秒，激励盟友立即发动攻击且提高攻击频率。

conditions.desc: Every second, Umberto's staff magically summons a swarming bee, which buzzes around the staff, up to a maximum of $max_bees___3 swarming bees. When an enemy attacks Umberto, he unleashes a swarming bee from the staff onto that enemy. When an enemy with one or more swarming bees is hit by any Champion, all their bees sting them, dealing $(seconds_plural amount) of BUD-based damage for each bee. A maximum of $amount___2 swarming bees can swarm a single enemy. Bees persist until the enemy is defeated, or until Umberto is removed from the formation.

Every second, Umberto's staff magically summons $amount___3 swarming bees, which buzz around the staff, up to a maximum of $max_bees___3 swarming bees. When an enemy attacks Umberto, he unleashes a swarming bee from the staff onto that enemy. When an enemy with one or more swarming bees is hit by any Champion, all their bees sting them, dealing $(seconds_plural amount) of BUD-based damage for each bee. A maximum of $amount___2 swarming bees can swarm a single enemy. Bees persist until the enemy is defeated, or until Umberto is removed from the formation.

每秒钟，翁贝托的法杖会神奇地生成一只蜜蜂，这些蜜蜂会蜂拥在法杖周围，最多可达 $max_bees___3 只。当一名敌人攻击翁贝托时，他会将法杖周围的一只蜜蜂释放到该敌人身边。当一名被一只或更多蜜蜂蜂拥着的敌人被任何勇士击中，其身边的所有蜜蜂会对其进行蛰击，每只蜜蜂造成等同于 $(seconds_plural amount) 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。一名敌人身边最多可蜂拥 $amount___2 只蜜蜂。蜜蜂会一直留在敌人身边，直到该敌人被击败，或者翁贝托被移出阵型。

每秒钟，翁贝托的法杖会神奇地生成 $amount___3 只蜜蜂，这些蜜蜂会蜂拥在法杖周围，最多可达 $max_bees___3 只。当一名敌人攻击翁贝托时，他会将法杖周围的一只蜜蜂释放到该敌人身边。当一名被一只或更多蜜蜂蜂拥着的敌人被任何勇士击中，其身边的所有蜜蜂会对其进行蛰击，每只蜜蜂造成等同于 $(seconds_plural amount) 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。一名敌人身边最多可蜂拥 $amount___2 只蜜蜂。蜜蜂会一直留在敌人身边，直到该敌人被击败，或者翁贝托被移出阵型。

description.desc: Umberto increases the damage of all Champions in the two columns behind him by $amount%
翁贝托会使他后方两列中所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%。

tipText.original: Umberto increases the damage of Champions in the two columns behind him.
tipText.display: 翁贝托会使他后方两列中勇士的伤害提高。

description.desc: Umberto increases the health of all other Champions by $amount% of his max health, and healing effects on all Champions is increased by $amount%.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the health of $target by $amount% of Umberto's max health and the effect of healing on $target by $amount%

description.desc: 翁贝托增加其他所有勇士的生命值，数值相当于他最大生命值的 $amount%，并且所有勇士的治疗效果提高 $amount%。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 提升 $target 的生命值，数值相当于翁贝托最大生命值的 $amount，对 $target 的回复效果提升 $amount

description.desc: Umberto increases the effect of Detective's Entourage by $amount% for each Lawful Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位守序阵营的勇士，翁贝托即提高“侦探随从”的效果 $amount%，以乘算方式叠加。

specializationDescription.original: Umberto's sense of duty resonates with the lawfully aligned.
specializationDescription.display: 翁贝托的责任感与守序阵营的勇士产生了共鸣。

description.desc: Umberto increases the effect of Detective's Entourage by $amount% for each unaffiliated Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位无从属组织阵营的勇士，翁贝托即提高“侦探随从”的效果 $amount%，以乘算方式叠加。

specializationDescription.original: Umberto's empathy extends to those without ties.
specializationDescription.display: 翁贝托的同情行使他对其他无依无靠的人伸出援手。

description.desc: Umberto increases the effect of Detective's Entourage by $amount% for each Ranger or Druid Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位巡林客或德鲁伊勇士，翁贝托即提高“侦探随从”的效果 $amount%，以乘算方式叠加。

specializationDescription.original: Umberto follows the call of the wild.
specializationDescription.display: 翁贝托听从野性的呼唤。

description.desc: Pick an Investigation to pursue. Umberto gains stacks of Clue, and can start another Investigation after the Investigation concludes. Each Clue stack increases Detective's Entourage by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively. Caps at $max_stacks stacks. Once you are capped, additional Investigations are not offered. Clue stacks persist between areas and reset when the adventure ends.
选择一项调查来进行。翁贝托会获得线索堆叠，并在调查结束后可开始另一项调查。每层线索堆叠会令侦探随从增加 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。堆叠上限为 $max_stacks 层。一旦你达到上限，将不再提供额外的调查。线索堆叠在不同区域之间会一直持续，在冒险结束时重置。

tipText.original: Umberto embarks on an ongoing investigation, periodically increasing his buffs to his allies.
tipText.display: 翁贝托展开持续调查，并定期为盟友增加增益。

description.desc: Umberto's Beehive Barrage increases the number of swarming bees spawned each second by $amount%, and when an enemy hits Umberto the maximum number of bees are unleashed. Finally, the damage per bee is increased by $(amount___2)%.
翁贝托的蜂巢弹幕会令每秒生成的蜂拥蜜蜂数量增加 $amount%，并且当一名敌人击中翁贝托时，他会释放出最大数量的蜜蜂。最后，每只蜜蜂的伤害增加 $(amount___2)%。

specializationDescription.original: Umberto's command over his swarm intensifies, increasing the rate he can send bees towards his enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 翁贝托加强了对蜂群的指挥，提高了向敌人输出蜜蜂的速度。

description.desc: Increases the maximum number of Ongoing Investigation's Clue stacks by $amount%.
令“持续调查”的线索堆叠最大数量增加 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: Umberto delves deeper into his investigations, empowering his allies during extended endeavors.
specializationDescription.display: 翁贝托深入开展调查，在长期努力中不断增强盟友的能力。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Detective's Entourage by $amount%.
使“侦探随从”的效果提高 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Umberto just focuses on supporting his fellow Champions, ignoring his loyal bees and his important investigations.
specializationDescription.display: 翁贝托只顾支持他的勇士同伴，忽视了他忠诚的蜜蜂和他的重要调查。

description.original: I will not rest until the killer is found.
description.display: 在找出凶手之前我是不会休息的。

description.original: We will put them behind bars like so many villains before them.
description.display: 我们会把他们关进监狱的，就像之前那些恶棍一样。

description.original: The bear is NOT happy.
description.display: 熊不高兴了。

description.original: I can take more hits than you, I can assure you.
description.display: 我可以向你保证，我可以比你承受更多的打击。

description.original: Errr, is this all you brought?
description.display: 呃，你就带了这些东西？

description.original: Do not boil your grey matter - it is not a soup.
description.display: 不要让你的大脑灰质沸腾了，那可不是汤。

description.original: You all are catching on fast!
description.display: 你们都学得很快！

description.original: Don't let your grey matter go to waste. That's what Brenton always told me.
description.display: 别让你的大脑灰质浪费了，这是布伦顿老跟我说的话。

description.original: I am sure you are all wondering why I gathered you here...
description.display: 我敢肯定你们都很想知道我为什么召集你们到这里来……

description.original: Your differences do not matter - we have a killer to find!
description.display: 你们的分歧无关紧要，我们有一个杀人凶手要找出来！

description.original: Now you have angered the bear.
description.display: 现在你把熊激怒了。

description.original: I only remember the things I need.
description.display: 我只记得我需要的东西。

description.original: Errr, there are a lot of you now...
description.display: 呃，你们现在人多势众了……

effects.description: Changes Detective's Entourage to additionally affect Umberto's column

description.original: You've done it now!
description.display: 你现在做到了！

effects.description: Increases the damage of Umberto's bees by $amount%

description.original: When the bees come together, nothing can stop them.
description.display: 当蜜蜂们聚在一起，什么都阻挡不了它们。

effects.description: Increases the maximum amount of bees that can swarm an enemy by $amount%

description.original: Your best course of action is to RUN!
description.display: 你最佳的行动方案就是跑！

effects.description: Increases the spawn rate of Umberto's bees by $amount%

description.original: And that is how they THOUGHT they got away with it!
description.display: 他们以为他们就是那样侥幸逃脱的！

effects.description: Increases the maximum number of Ongoing Investigation's Clue Stacks by $amount%

description.original: If you search their bags, you will find plenty of evidence to put them away.
description.display: 如果你搜他们的包，你会找到很多能把他们关起来的证据。

effects.description: Adds $amount Clue Stacks to Umberto's Ongoing Investigation

character_sheet_details.backstory: Umberto Thornheart is the orphaned child of two infamous thieves, and saw his parents executed for their crimes. Rather than live on the streets, he was taken in by the very detective who arrested his parents, and eventually became a detective himself, hoping to protect the innocent and (perhaps) reform the guilty.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Umberto Thornheart fights enemies with bees from his Swarmstaff and transforms into a formidable brown bear when situations are dire. His ongoing investigations progressively enhance his abilities, making him an invaluable asset in long adventures.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 翁贝托·棘心在亲眼见到臭名昭著的小偷父母获罪处决后，变成了孤儿。他没有流浪街头，而是被逮捕父母的侦探收养，并最终成长为一名侦探，希望能够保护无辜之人，以及改造罪犯（如果可以的话）。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 翁贝托·棘心用蜂杖中的蜜蜂与敌人搏斗，并能在情况危急时变身为一头威猛的棕熊。他的技能会随着他的调查而逐步增强，使他非常适合于长期冒险。

original.description: Umberto magically unleashes a bee swarm at the nearest foe, dealing 1 hit.

display.name: 野蜂乱舞
